name: VRでレムと異世界生活-膝枕&添寝編
slug: vrでレムと異世界生活-膝枕添寝編
short_description: The app allows you to enter the world of "Re:ZERO - Starting Life in Another World."
detailed_description:
VR compatible! The app allows you to enter the world of "Re:ZERO - Starting Life in Another World."
※This app is a one-time purchase. No in-game purchases are required to enjoy the game in full.

All-new recordings by Rem's voice actress, Iori Minase!

-Play Modes
*"Lap pillow" mode: Rest your head on Rem's lap as she gently eases you into sleep.
*"Lying together" mode: Rem lies down next to you as she gently eases you into sleep.
*"View" mode: Enjoy a 360-degree view of Rem's 1:1 scale VR model from any angle you desire.

supported_languages:

*languages with full audio support
